01-grid-composition.title: Grid Composition
01-grid-composition.description: Gallery items arranged in a configurable grid with consistent gap and aspect ratio.

02-item-orientation.title: Item Orientation
02-item-orientation.description: Gallery items can be oriented vertically (stacked view + body) or horizontally (side-by-side view + body).

03-span-layout.title: Span Layout
03-span-layout.description: A featured item spans multiple columns and rows to create an editorial grid layout.
